journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page shows 'Welcome to WonderWorld!' with a name input and 'Let's Go!' button visible without scrolling.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js canvas renders at 1504x1050 and a sidebar offers 12 shape/object pickers (Block, Ball, Pillar, Cone, Ring, Tree, House, Person, Rock, Flower, Cloud, Star).

journey-ai.evidence: AI buddy 'Sparky' is present as a floating panel; typing 'help me' returns 'Your world is waiting! What do you want to add first?'

journey-save.evidence: After clicking Save and reloading, the dashboard shows 'My Worlds (1)' with 'TestUser's World' listing 1 object, and re-opening loads the world with its name preserved.

journey-gallery.evidence: The /gallery route renders a 'My Worlds' page displaying a card for 'TestUser's World' with object count and date.

spec-product-concept.evidence: final-reply has brief mention but no substantive concept summary (problem, audience, value prop)

spec-personas.evidence: no persona document or section found anywhere in project

spec-journeys.evidence: no user journey document or section found anywhere in project

spec-feature-list.evidence: final-reply lists 7+ categorized features under Core features delivered

spec-ia.evidence: final-reply App structure section with 4 routes and descriptions of content per route

spec-ui-direction.evidence: no design direction document; code has styling but no articulated design rationale

spec-tech-arch.evidence: final-reply has single sentence tech stack line, insufficient for 3-sentence threshold

spec-db-schema.evidence: src/types/world.ts:1-44 defines WorldObject, World, CreativeChallenge, AIMessage interfaces

spec-ai-prompts.evidence: src/lib/ai-prompts.ts:14-98 comprehensive system prompt with rules, context-aware prompts, reflection prompts

spec-safety.evidence: src/lib/ai-prompts.ts:27-34 lists 5 explicit NEVER rules for child safety in AI interactions

spec-impl-plan.evidence: no implementation plan document found anywhere in project

spec-starter-code.evidence: src/ directory with 20+ files: components, store, types, API routes, pages

spec-priority-screens.evidence: no prioritized list of screens/components to build first found anywhere

visual-anti-patterns.evidence: Soft pink-to-blue gradient background visible on landing and gallery pages counts as one anti-pattern; no orbs, no nested cards, no clutter, text sizes adequate.

visual-child-friendly.evidence: Emoji-based object palette, friendly Sparky AI buddy, big colorful buttons, and minimal text density are well-suited for children; small icon-only undo/redo buttons slightly reduce the score.

visual-consistency.evidence: Purple/magenta heading color and rounded card radii are consistent, but button styles drift across pages (pink gradient on landing, solid purple on gallery, green on builder toolbar).

visual-accessibility.evidence: Good text-on-white contrast and visible selection rings on theme picker, but undo/redo and close buttons are icon-only without labels and no responsive-width evidence is shown.

eng-env-safety.evidence: env config present, no hardcoded keys
